author: Duncan Ogilvie
message:
Merge pull request #3898 from m417z/remove-second-manifest

Disable linker manifest generation for exe and launcher

author: Michael Maltsev
message:
Disable linker manifest generation for exe and launcher

resource.rc already embeds manifest.xml as an RT_MANIFEST resource. With
the MSVC linker's default manifest generation left on, the linker embeds
its own minimal manifest too, producing two RT_MANIFEST resources in the
PE (the rich rc one at language 0 and the linker default at language
1033). They coexist because resource identity is (type, name, language).

The old Visual Studio projects suppressed this via GenerateManifest=false
(commit a339dd2d), but that setting was lost when the projects were
removed in favor of CMake (commit df110dc0). Restore it by adding
/MANIFEST:NO to the link options of the two targets that embed the
manifest, so only the resource.rc manifest is kept.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.8 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

author: Michael Maltsev
message:
Improve db/dw/dd/dq instructions

Allow multiple values, negative values, and packed bytes.

Previously implemented:
db 12 ; single 0x12 byte
dw 1234 ; single 0x1234 word

This PR implements:
db -2 ; one byte: 0xFE
db 12 34 ; two bytes: 0x12 0x34
dw 1234 56 ; two words: 0x1234 0x0056
db 123456 ; three bytes: 0x12 0x34 0x56
db 123 ; two bytes: 0x01 0x23

The packed syntax (no spaces) is only implemented for db.

author: Duncan Ogilvie

Merge pull request #3883 from winstonwolfrce/cmdline

Don't overwrite explicit command line with DB-loaded one on launch

author: Winston Wolf
message:
Don't overwrite explicit command line with DB-loaded one on launch

When a command line is explicitly provided at startup, skip loading
the saved command line from the database so the explicit one is used.
